title: Glitch Intro Effect
narration_transcript: This is the glitch intro effect, an easy way to grab attention fast. First, grab a clip of just your background, make sure to match your settings in both clips. Now record your intro for your second clip. Now in CapCut, add your background as the main clip and your intro clip as an overlay under it. Zoom in, then on the overlay, tap split for every 2 or so frames, then delete every other clip. Finally, add a glitch sound to really sell the effect. And that's the edit. Follow for more easy mobile edits that actually work.

source_meta.caption:
This glitch intro is such an easy way to grab attention fast ⚡️⁠
⁠
How it works (simple):⁠
→ Film a clean background clip⁠
→ Film your intro (same camera settings)⁠
→ Stack them in CapCut⁠
→ Split the overlay every couple of frames⁠
→ Delete every other slice⁠
→ Add a glitch sound to sell it⁠
⁠
📌 Save this to try later⁠
📲 Follow for easy mobile edits that actually work⁠
💬 Comment THAT CREATOR to get my CapCut Crash Course⁠
⁠
#capcuttutorial #mobileediting #glitcheffect #editinghacks

result_description: A fast strobing glitch intro: your intro shot stutters against a clean background plate to grab attention.

inputs.name: background_clip
inputs.what_to_film: A clean background plate (no subject), matching your camera settings.

inputs.name: intro_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Your intro, same framing and camera settings.

edit_steps.note: background as main clip, intro as overlay underneath
zoom in on the timeline and split every ~2 frames
delete every other split clip → strobe between intro and background
add a glitch sound to sell it

success_criteria: Background & intro framing match so only the subject flickers
Glitch SFX lands with the stutter
